name: Founder Engineering Pack
description: Reusable engineering employee profile and review workflow for a one-person company.

profiles.name: Founder Engineer
profiles.description: Builds features from task prompts and prepares reviewable output.
profiles.instructions: Follow the task acceptance criteria, keep implementation scoped, and leave clear verification evidence.

bundledSkills.name: Review Loop
bundledSkills.description: Capture reviewer feedback and turn it into reusable work rules.

scripts.name: optional-validation
scripts.description: Listed for review only; inspection must not execute it.

workflowTemplates.name: Developer Reviewer Loop
workflowTemplates.description: Developer creates output, reviewer checks it, developer revises until accepted or manager escalation.
